title: Blackspur BB-RG105 Multi Purpose Nitrile Coated Glove
features: Ideal for use around the house, construction or in the garden, these non slip nitrile coated gloves will provide you with extra gripping power.
They comply with the general requirements for PPE.
UKCA/CE Category II; EN388 4121X; EN ISO 2142:22, EN 388:216+A1:218
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: Product Description Blackspur non slip nitrile coated gloves will provide you with extra gripping power. Ideal for use around the house, construction or in the garden. CE Approved. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Glove
